videos.title: 14.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
14.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Why the Big-12 is no more of a power conference than the Pac-12 + what stands out from Phil Steele
videos.summary_source_text:
Why the Big-12 is no more of a power conference than the Pac-12 + what stands out from Phil Steele Justin Michael talks about Trey McBride being one of six players in the NFL to receive a 99 overall rating on Madden 27 and why that’s a big deal for Colorado State’s national representation. He then talks about Lawrence McCutcheon and gives out the CSU Stat of the Day. Finally, in honor of Hot Take Tuesday for ALLCITY Spirit Week, Justin talks about why the concept of the power four is a farce in 2026. He then finishes with what stood out to him from a CSU perspective in Phil Steele’s annual college football preview magazine.

Agent Operating System Q&A: Setup, Modules, n8n Automation, Token Minimization & More

The host answers recent community questions about an Agent Operating System (Agent OS), described as a single place to run multiple AI agents with strong memory, automation, app connections, and customization. They explain how to set it up by uploading an Agent OS ZIP template to an agent like ChatGPT or Claude and prompting it to install and configure locally, noting the ZIP includes install docs and roughly 28 modules that can be chosen individually (e.g., Hermes and Apollo voice agent). They discuss using n8n for automation, recommending having an AI agent set up workflows (including Claude with the n8n MCP) or using n8n’s AI automation builder instead of hiring builders. They show additional workflows like a Game Studio for creating games, address token-limit concerns by suggesting a token minimization playbook and tools like Headroom, Caveman, and RTK, highlight community-shared automations (e.g., LinkedIn follow-ups), and direct viewers to the AI Profit Boardroom for tutorials, updates, coaching calls, and local networking.

videos.title: Rotowire: Nathan MacKinnon and the Colorado Avalanche Are Not Well Liked
videos.summary_source_text:
Rotowire: Nathan MacKinnon and the Colorado Avalanche Are Not Well Liked Colorado Avalanche emerge as one of the NHL’s most hated teams, but does that animosity fuel their dominance in the Central Division? Nathan MacKinnon’s polarizing reputation surprises even die-hard fans, ranking him among the league’s most disliked players according to Rotowire’s new map breakdown. Meanwhile, the Avalanche secure a one-year deal with Fabian Lysell—can this "prove-it" contract ignite his potential and bolster Colorado’s bottom-six forward group?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect Rotowire’s rankings for most hated teams, players, and loyal fanbases, revealing surprising rivalries and unexpected grudges across the league. They explore why Vegas Golden Knights top the villain charts, which players get under fans’ skin, and how Colorado’s passionate fanbase stacks up nationwide. The hosts wrap with a look at the New York Islanders’ innovative fan-designed third jersey contest. Can other NHL franchises match this level of engagement?

 Isaiah J. Downing-Imagn Images

videos.title: Kamaru Usman On Facing Du Plessis + Fight Week Emotions + Learning To Control Fear | Closed Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Kamaru Usman On Facing Du Plessis + Fight Week Emotions + Learning To Control Fear | Closed Course Welcome back to another episode of Closed Course!

This week's special guest is former undisputed UFC Welterweight Champion Kamaru Usman, who owns a 21-4 MMA record. With nine wins by knockout, one by submission, and 11 by decision, he's earned the nickname "The Nigerian Nightmare." He's stepping into the Octagon in Oklahoma City this weekend, but before then, we've got him in studio for an action-packed interview that you won't want to miss.

With a fight coming up this weekend against Dricus Du Plessis, Usman discusses the emotions that come with fight week and the thoughts that race through his mind as he prepares to step into the Octagon. He also shares his broader mindset as a fighter and explains how training differs from the actual fight. For Usman, training places a heavy emphasis on the physical aspects of fighting, but once fight night arrives, it becomes almost entirely mental. He takes a deep dive into how he's developed that mindset over time and fine-tuned both his physical and mental preparation throughout his career.

Usman also dives into some other intriguing topics, including how he controls fear, his biggest rivalries, the role of trash talk in the UFC, his personal and family life, and his journey into the game of golf.

Check out Kamaru Usman’s podcast, “Pound 4 Pound” co-hosted with Henry Cejudo, talking everything combat sports

videos.title: TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List
videos.summary_source_text:
TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List On Tuesday, July 14, The Athletic's Scott Wheeler dropped his Top 100 NHL Drafted Prospects list for Summer 2026. Regarding the Carolina Hurricanes,  they had only two players make the Top 100, with a third just missing out as one of the last few to be cut. That said, do their placements make sense, and should there have been another one or two within the organization to be on the list? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Bradly Nadeau making the list in the Tier 4 range at the 56th spot. Does what Wheeler said about Nadeau make sense, or is he off? Plus, should Nadeau be higher on the list and in a different tier? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Ivan Ryabkin making the Tier 6 range at the 98th spot. Should he be higher, or is he in the right spot according to Wheeler? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how Felix Unger-Sorum just missed out on the Top 100. Should he have been on the list, or did missing out make sense? Plus, who else within the Hurricanes organization has a case to make the Top 100 list? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 7 AI Conspiracies That Turn Out To Be Real (AI Myth Busters Ep01)
videos.summary_source_text:
7 AI Conspiracies That Turn Out To Be Real (AI Myth Busters Ep01) Five AI conspiracies sound completely ridiculous until you look at the evidence. In the first episode of AI Myth Busters, we investigate thirteen claims involving ChatGPT, OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, AI detectors, privacy, bot traffic, model collapse, data centers, and the future of work.
Did ChatGPT really start slacking off in December? Does every prompt consume a bottle of water? Can an em dash expose AI-written text? Did Claude actually blackmail someone to avoid being shut down? Are your private ChatGPT conversations helping train future models? Some of these myths fall apart instantly. Others turn out to be disturbingly close to the truth.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
Claude, Gemini, GPT-4.1, Grok, and DeepSeek choose blackmail during simulated safety tests
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/research/agentic-misalignment
Personal ChatGPT conversations may be used to improve future models unless users opt out
SOURCE: https://help.openai.com/en/articles/5722486-how-your-data-is-used-to-improve-model-performance
Bots generated 51% of all web traffic in 2024 and officially overtook humans
SOURCE: https://www.imperva.com/blog/2025-imperva-bad-bot-report-how-ai-is-supercharging-the-bot-threat/
Researchers discover model collapse when AI repeatedly trains on AI-generated content
SOURCE: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07566-y
AI detectors flag human-written documents including the US Constitution as AI-generated
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/07/why-ai-detectors-think-the-us-constitution-was-written-by-ai/
Researchers test whether ChatGPT becomes less productive during December
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/12/is-chatgpt-becoming-lazier-because-its-december-people-run-tests-to-find-out/
The viral claim that every AI prompt consumes an entire bottle of water
SOURCE: https://news.ucr.edu/articles/2023/04/28/ai-programs-consume-large-volumes-scarce-water
OpenAI finally addresses ChatGPT’s infamous em dash writing habit
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/ai/2025/11/forget-agi-sam-altman-celebrates-chatgpt-finally-following-em-dash-formatting-rules/
AI could create 170 million jobs while displacing another 92 million by 2030
SOURCE: https://www.weforum.org/press/2025/01/future-of-jobs-report-2025-78-million-new-job-opportunities-by-2030-but-urgent-upskilling-needed-to-prepare-workforces/

🚨 Why It Matters
These are more than strange internet rumors. They expose real questions about AI privacy, safety, environmental costs, synthetic content, unreliable detection tools, and how little we still understand about advanced models.
AI is already changing what we read, how we communicate, and what people consider authentic human work. As bots and AI-generated content continue spreading across the internet, separating documented evidence from viral exaggeration becomes more important than ever.

SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/07/why-ai-detectors-think-the-us-constitution-was-written-by-ai/
Researchers test whether ChatGPT becomes less productive during December
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/12/is-chatgpt-becoming-lazier-because-its-december-people-run-tests-to-find-out/
The viral claim that every AI prompt consumes an entire bottle of water
SOURCE: https://news.ucr.edu/articles/2023/04/28/ai-programs-consume-large-volumes-scarce-water
OpenAI finally addresses ChatGPT’s infamous em dash writing habit
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/ai/2025/11/forget-agi-sam-altman-celebrates-chatgpt-finally-following-em-dash-formatting-rules/
AI could create 170 million jobs while displacing another 92 million by 2030
SOURCE: https://www.weforum.org/press/2025/01/future-of-jobs-report-2025-78-million-new-job-opportunities-by-2030-but-urgent-upskilling-needed-to-prepare-workforces/

🚨 Why It Matters
These are more than strange internet rumors. They expose real questions about AI privacy, safety, environmental costs, synthetic content, unreliable detection tools, and how little we still understand about advanced models.
AI is already changing what we read, how we communicate, and what people consider authentic human work. As bots and AI-generated content continue spreading across the internet, separating documented evidence from viral exaggeration becomes more important than ever.

#ai #chatgpt #openai

videos.title: The Open Championship Preview, Picks to win at Royal Birkdale | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
The Open Championship Preview, Picks to win at Royal Birkdale | The Drop The Drop is gearing up for the final major of the 2026 season as the TOUR heads to Royal Birkdale and the 154th playing of The Open Championship. We’ll spend the first part of the show giving picks and predictions for who will be raising the Claret Jug on Sunday. The EliminaTOUR makes its final appearance of the year, using stats, trends and history to whittle the field down from the full entry list all the way down to one winner. Our host Alexandra O’Laughlin played Royal Birkdale a week ago and she provides some course logistics and things to look for as the event plays out. Later we are joined by Sky Sports lead golf presenter Nick Daugherty as he breaks down some of the key players and who he thinks will be in contention. Finally, we’ll react to the PGA TOUR announcement that Chasing Sunday – a behind-the-scenes collaboration between PGA TOUR Studios and NFL Films – will return during the week of the BMW Championship.

videos.title: Best Home Run Derby Ever? + Peyton Watson Problems Loom For Nuggets | After The Horn Ep 57
videos.summary_source_text:
Best Home Run Derby Ever? + Peyton Watson Problems Loom For Nuggets | After The Horn Ep 57 Welcome back to Episode 57 of ‘After The Horn’ with Woody Paige, Tom Green, and Ron Zappolo!

On this week's episode, Woody, Ron, and Tom kick off the program with a hilarious segment surrounding the man who was launched 8 feet into the air by a bison in Yellowstone. Thankfully, the individual is okay, despite suffering a few injuries. The guys watch back the crazy footage of the incident and even find some sports parallels to the viral clip.

After a few good laughs in the opening minutes, the guys transition into baseball talk, specifically surrounding the Rockies and the All-Star break. The Rockies are continuing to make "the bad kind of history" in that they have been in last place in their division prior to the All-Star break in consecutive years. Despite this disappointing reality, the MLB All-Star break has already brought excitement to baseball fans in the form of a Home Run Derby that Woody claims may be the best ever.

The NBA offseason continues to coast along, but the Nuggets have made almost no moves. Despite recently signing former EuroLeague Defensive Player of the Year Alpha Diallo, it still feels like a major trade needs to happen. The Nuggets are shopping sign-and-trade options for Peyton Watson, which also means we could see the young forward leave Denver after a breakout season. How much longer will the Nuggets stay quiet, and if they do decide to make a move, what will it be?

LeBron James rumors continue to heat up despite him leaving Denver, it feels like the Broncos are getting more confident as the season approaches, and the FIFA World Cup is once again looking to be a smashing success during its quadrennial appearance. Woody, Ron, and Tom have thoughts on all of it.

Tune into ‘After The Horn’ on Tuesdays at 5:00 PM MST to hear hot takes, stories, and share laughs with three Denver sports legends. Stream ‘After The Horn’ wherever you get your podcasts, and on X, YouTube, and Facebook @ Guerilla Sports.

Powered by: redbirdfarms.com | @redbirdchicken

videos.title: The Secret To Pulling The Puck Between Your Legs
videos.summary_source_text:
The Secret To Pulling The Puck Between Your Legs The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Come take a tour with me around the facility that is The Trott Shop.

In this video I explain everything we offer at The Trott Shop and more importantly what to expect from your experience.

I strongly believe teaching and fitting are intertwined, if you reserve a session with me then expect to leave with some key points that can help you get the most out of your new golf clubs.

At the conclusion of any fitting WE BUILD YOUR CLUBS ON LOCATION. 

As I explain in this video:

WE FIT FOR THE FUTURE OF YOUR GAME

NO MATTER WHAT YOUR LEVEL WE CAN TAKE CARE OF YOU

THIS IS AS CLOSE OF A TOUR EXPERIENCE THAT I COULD CREATE FOR CONSUMERS

videos.title: Could Arbitration ACTUALLY Be The Best Outcome For Jason Robertson & The Stars? | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Could Arbitration ACTUALLY Be The Best Outcome For Jason Robertson & The Stars? | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

It’s Day 2 of ALLCITY Spirit Week 2026. Today’s theme: Hot Take Tuesday.

We have spent the last two months discussing Jason Robertson. We have gone over things with a fine-toothed comb, talking through the contract negotiations, the surprise trade attempts (and rejections) and now the potential for an arbitration hearing on July 25th. Generally, teams and players try to avoid going to an arbitration hearing, as it can leave lingering bad blood and/or hurt feelings. But could this actually be the best solution to the problem for Robertson and the Stars?
Also on today’s show, we look at the NHL’s top goal scorers by on-ice location in 2025-26, the NHL Alumni Association announced a new post-retirement wellness plan, plus a boatload of NHL News & Notes.

videos.title: 10 Blood Pressure Mistakes That Could Be Giving You the Wrong Reading | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
10 Blood Pressure Mistakes That Could Be Giving You the Wrong Reading | Dr. Mandell Are you checking your blood pressure correctly—or could simple mistakes be making your reading look higher than it really is? In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains 10 of the most common blood pressure measurement mistakes people make at home and how to correct them so your numbers are more accurate, consistent, and useful. You’ll learn why it’s important to rest quietly before checking your blood pressure, how the wrong cuff size can affect your results, why the cuff should be placed directly on bare skin, how arm position and body posture can change the reading, why talking during the measurement matters, and why coffee, smoking, vaping, alcohol, exercise, a full bladder, and anxiety can all temporarily influence your numbers. You’ll also learn why relying on only one reading can be misleading and why taking two or three measurements about one minute apart may give you a better picture of your true resting blood pressure. These small corrections can make a major difference, especially for anyone who tracks their blood pressure regularly or feels anxious when seeing the numbers on the monitor. Remember, one isolated reading does not define your health—the pattern over time, measured with the correct technique, is what matters most. Always discuss persistently high or unusually low readings with your healthcare provider, and never change medication based on one home reading without professional guidance. Please share this video with family and friends because there is a good chance someone you care about is making one or more of these mistakes without realizing it. Accurate technique leads to more reliable information, better conversations with your doctor, and greater peace of mind.

videos.title: The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It) Your avocados and avocado oil may not be as healthy as you think. Artificial ripening and processing can affect the quality, flavor, and natural compounds found in both avocados and avocado oil.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4yiGjrD

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Things to consider:
• Many avocados are artificially ripened with ethylene gas before reaching grocery stores
• Artificial ripening may not allow the fruit to fully develop its natural flavor compounds and phytonutrients
• Refined and unrefined avocado oils can vary significantly in quality
• Processing methods such as refining and deodorization may contribute to oxidation, even if the oil no longer has an off-taste or smell
• Choosing naturally ripened avocados and minimally processed avocado oil may help preserve more of their natural flavor and beneficial compounds

Grok 4.5 vs GPT-5.6 Sol — Which AI Model Actually Wins? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI just released GPT-5.6 Sol, and xAI launched Grok 4.5 only a day earlier.

Instead of repeating launch-day hype, this video breaks down what the official documentation, pricing, benchmarks, safety reports, and independent testing actually say.

We compare:

• GPT-5.6 Sol
• Grok 4.5
• Context window
• Pricing
• Coding performance
• Reasoning benchmarks
• Artificial Analysis scores
• Hallucination rates
• Safety documentation
• Speed tests
• Enterprise deployment
• Which model is actually worth using

This isn't a fanboy comparison.

It's a data-driven look at where each model wins, where each one falls short, and what the marketing conveniently leaves out.

Losing distance

videos.title: What's in Min Woo Lee's Golf Bag? | The Open Special!
videos.summary_source_text:
What's in Min Woo Lee's Golf Bag? | The Open Special! In this video Guy Charnock and Kellen Watson take a look through Min Woo Lee's golf clubs ahead of the 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. We even get a look at the brand new Odyssey TRTL putter! 

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

Obsidian + AI Agents: Build an Infinite Context Engine (Second Brain in 20 Minutes)

This script introduces a one-hour free course on using Obsidian as a shared “second brain” for multiple AI agents by storing everything as linked markdown files in a local vault. It explains why Obsidian acts as a universal context engine across tools like Claude, Hermes, Codex, and ChatGPT, shows how to download Obsidian, open the vault folder in an agent, and have the agent create and tag new notes automatically. The course outlines organizing a vault with the PARA method, using tags and the knowledge graph to visualize connections, and extracting existing memories from different AI tools via prompts. It then presents an “infinite context engine” loop using Omi to capture daily screen/mic memories, export them to Obsidian, and let agents read/write daily logs for automated, continuously improving context.

videos.title: En träning med Pumpen | Drömmen om Elitserien – S1A3
videos.summary_source_text:
En träning med Pumpen | Drömmen om Elitserien – S1A3 Drömmen om Elitserien är en dokumentärserie där du får följa IFK Kungälv bakom kulisserna under jakten på en plats i Elitserien.

I avsnitt 3 får du följa med under en träning tillsammans med huvudtränaren Pumpen – som dessutom är micad. Hör instruktionerna, snacket med spelarna och allt som händer bakom kulisserna under ett träningspass.

Prenumerera för att följa resan mot Elitserien! ❤️💙 Drömmen om Elitserien är en dokumentärserie där du får följa IFK Kungälv bakom kulisserna under jakten på en plats i Elitserien.

videos.title: Should You Exercise While Fasting?
videos.summary_source_text:
Should You Exercise While Fasting? Many people assume they should avoid exercise while fasting. This approach is just the opposite. Exercising in a fasted state is used to help preserve muscle while encouraging the body to burn stored fat. Instead of working against each other, fasting and exercise can be powerful tools when they're used together.

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the conversation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

videos.title: Try This Awesome AI Video Transition!
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Awesome AI Video Transition! How to "Time Travel" in your next video with this SUPER easy editing trick!

You don't need complex VFX software to create seamless, mind-bending transitions anymore. Here is a straightforward way to jump between locations using AI tools like Runway, Kling, or Leonardo:

Step 1: Record your intro in Location A, then head to Location B. Try to wear the same outfit and match your pose at the start of the second clip—it makes the final transition much more believable.
Step 2: Take a screenshot of the very last frame of Clip A, and the very first frame of Clip B.
Step 3: Upload these two images as your starting and ending keyframes in an AI tool (I used Runway's Seedance 2.0 for the edit you see in this video).
Step 4: Use a prompt like this: “The camera shoots up like a big jump transition and reveals the second location in one smooth motion. The man does not speak.” (Pro-tip: Adding "does not speak" stops the AI from generating weird facial movements).
Step 5: Download the generated clip, place it between your two original videos, and apply a short crossfade or smooth cut to hide the seams.

This method works for teleporting, outfit changes, mic tosses, and more.

Save this post so you can reference the prompt later, and tag a creator who needs to try this! 🎬

videos.title: One Vaping Device = Two Cartons of Cigarettes?!
videos.summary_source_text:
One Vaping Device = Two Cartons of Cigarettes?! Did you know that one vape is equal to 2 cartons of cigarettes? Discover the side effects of nicotine addiction, debunk common vaping myths, and learn the truth about vaping.

0:00 Is vaping bad for you? 
0:20 Vaping facts 
0:54 Nicotine addiction
2:03 Vaping myths
3:04 Are vapes water vapor? 
4:48 Vaping and dopamine

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fxLtZg

Watch these next to learn more about overcoming addiction and supporting a healthy heart:
▶️ https://youtu.be/9ykPs8tberw
▶️ https://youtu.be/G1Z4703YstY

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

One vaping device can deliver the equivalent of hundreds of cigarette puffs. Many people don’t realize that the average vaping device contains about 650 mg of nicotine, making nicotine addiction easy to develop.

Flavorings used in vapes were never intended to be inhaled. When you vape, the aerosol enters your lungs and bloodstream, exposing your body to nicotine and other toxic compounds.

Every time you use a vape, your nicotine receptors become desensitized, increasing your craving for more nicotine over time. Nicotine is also a stimulant that constricts blood vessels, promotes inflammation, and can lead to chemical dependence.

One of the most common vaping myths is that vapes only contain water vapor. In reality, many vaping products contain solvents, glycerin, synthetic flavorings, formaldehyde, and other toxic byproducts in addition to nicotine.

DATA:
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12628669/ 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11317248/  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10520052/

videos.title: Russell, Reliability Or Ferrari? What Is Kimi’s Biggest Threat? | Belgian GP Preview | F1 Nation
videos.summary_source_text:
Russell, Reliability Or Ferrari? What Is Kimi’s Biggest Threat? | Belgian GP Preview | F1 Nation Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver Jolyon Palmer and IndyCar race winner James Hinchcliffe to preview this weekend’s Belgian Grand Prix.

Having failed to score points in two of the last three Grands Prix due to car problems, Kimi Antonelli has seen his championship lead cut from 66 points to just 25. So what is the biggest threat to Kimi’s hopes of becoming World Champion this year? His teammate George Russell, Ferrari or Mercedes’ reliability issues?

On a recent episode, Jolyon suggested that Ferrari need to back Lewis Hamilton over Charles Leclerc if they’re to fight Mercedes for the title. After Leclerc’s victory at Silverstone, has his opinion changed?

The guys also discuss an ‘upset’ Max Verstappen, why things could get ‘spicy’ at Racing Bulls, and Carlos Sainz’s reaction to a disappointing weekend for Williams at the British Grand Prix.

You’ll also hear their podium predictions for Spa and how wet weather could mix things up.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Did the Avalanche Get Better This Summer? | GS Off Ice
videos.summary_source_text:
Did the Avalanche Get Better This Summer? | GS Off Ice Today Meghan Angley is joined by Denver Gazette Avalanche beat writer Evan Rawal to break down every major move from the Colorado Avalanche's offseason and what it all means heading into the 2026-27 season.

We discuss the team's decision to bring back Brent Burns, Brett Kulak's long-term extension, and whether those deals make sense in the bigger picture. We also dive into the departures of Ross Colton, Val Nichushkin, and Jack Drury, and examine what Colorado gained in return with additions like Zach L'Heureux, Fedor Svechkov, Jaden Schwartz, Noah Juulsen, and more.

Plus, Evan shares his thoughts on the Avalanche's 2026 draft class, development camp standouts, the current state of the prospect pipeline, and the organization's goaltending depth. We wrap up by predicting Colorado's opening-night roster, highlighting the biggest training camp battles, and discussing what still needs to go right for this team to make another Stanley Cup run. videos.title: 13.07.26 - RIFT Education Day
videos.summary_source_text:
13.07.26 - RIFT Education Day RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. Texas Rangers in First Place At All-Star Break Thanks To Walk Off vs Astros | DLLS Rangers Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

An ALLCITY Network Production

The Texas Rangers, even though they are only two games above .500, hit the All-Star break in first place in the American League West. They also have momentum on their after a walk-off win Sunday over the Astros. The Rangers won 2 of 3 from Houston and also 2 of 3 on the homestand from the Angels. Only one player, closer Jacob Latz, made the All-Star team. The Rangers are also coming off of the MLB Draft, where they went with prep players in the first three rounds — Gio Rojas, Connor Comeau and 6-foot-9 Brody Bumila, who needs elbow surgery for the second time in two years.

videos.title: Marcelo Balboa On Messi's Legacy + Golden Boot Predictions + World Cup Excitement | GS MoodSwings
videos.summary_source_text:
Marcelo Balboa On Messi's Legacy + Golden Boot Predictions + World Cup Excitement | GS MoodSwings Welcome back to another episode of MoodSwings with Liv Moods!

On this weeks episode, Liv dives into the latest NBA news and what's trending in the world of basketball. The Nuggets recently signed Alpha Diallo to a 1-year deal. The former Euro-League defensive player of the year took a pay cut to sign his first NBA contract, and Liv discusses what this move will do for the Nuggets next season.

Liv is also joined by Marcelo Balboa, a former player for the USMNT and a member of the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Marcelo talks about how much excitement the 2026 FIFA World Cup has brought to the United States, and how much more exciting soccer there is to come with the semi's right around the corner. Marcelo also discusses the legacy that Messi will leave on the FIFA World Cup, and how exciting it's been to watch him lead Argentina to this point in the tournament. He also gives his picks for the Golden Boot winner, including some sleeper picks you might not expect to win.

Don't miss this AWESOME interview with Marcelo Balboa and all his insight on the FIFA World Cup! Welcome back to another episode of MoodSwings with Liv Moods!

videos.title: Hindi - 13.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 13.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Why is Vagal Tone Important?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why is Vagal Tone Important? Homeostasis is the body's ability to maintain balance despite constant changes in the environment. The vagus nerve plays an essential role in that process by helping the body recover after physical or emotional stress. The stronger the vagal tone, the better the body can adapt to everyday challenges and return to a healthy baseline.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. videos.title: OpenAI vs Apple AI War Just Started and It’s Absolutely Crazy
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI vs Apple AI War Just Started and It’s Absolutely Crazy Apple has sued OpenAI, io Products, and two former employees, alleging a coordinated effort to take confidential hardware information. The case centers on text messages, access to Apple servers after employment ended, unreleased prototypes brought to interviews, security procedures allegedly bypassed, supplier secrets, and OpenAI’s race to build an AI device that could challenge the iPhone. This video breaks down what Apple claims really happened and why the details are absolutely wild.

SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/legal/litigation/apple-sues-openai-alleging-misappropriation-trade-secrets-court-records-show-2026-07-10/
1:57 — Apple targets OpenAI hardware chief Tang Tan and former engineer Chang Liu
SOURCE: https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/10/apple-sues-openai-over-alleged-trade-secret-theft/

This is bigger than another corporate lawsuit. Apple claims OpenAI’s hardware push involved stolen files, insider access, supplier knowledge, and secret prototypes. If proven, the case could disrupt OpenAI’s first device and reshape the race to replace the smartphone.

videos.title: 7 Punch Turn Essentials
videos.summary_source_text:
7 Punch Turn Essentials The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.summary_source_text:
Why Jaden Schwartz's FIT in Colorado Might Be PERFECT! | Avs Film Room Jaden Schwartz is officially part of the Colorado Avalanche after signing a three-year deal, and this Avs Film Room breaks down why his skill set could be a perfect fit in Colorado. From board battles and neutral-zone possession to creating offense in the home-plate area, Schwartz brings the gritty, middle-lane game the Avalanche need around their top talent. We dive into the film on how the former Seattle Kraken forward exits the defensive zone, enters with possession, wins around the net, and creates high-danger chances that could translate perfectly to the Avs’ system.

videos.title: Build A Custom Browser Extension [SUPER Easy!]
videos.summary_source_text:
Build A Custom Browser Extension [SUPER Easy!] I built a fully functioning Chrome extension in about 10 minutes.

I used the new GLM 5.2 model to build it. It's open-weight, open-source and incredibly cost-effective for coding tasks while still being reliable and delivery high-quality outputs (not sponsored, just sharing because I like it a lot). 

Once you run the prompt, here's how you install it:
1️⃣ Save the files generated by GLM 5.2 (or whichever AI model you choose for this) into a folder on your computer.
2️⃣ Open Google Chrome, click the three dots in the top right, and go to Extensions ➡️ Manage Extensions (or type chrome://extensions/ in your search bar).
3️⃣ Toggle on Developer Mode in the top right-hand corner.
4️⃣ Click Load unpacked in the top left, and select your folder.

Just like that, your custom extension is installed and ready to use.

📌 SAVE this video so you can refer back to the steps later, and follow for more practical AI tips!

videos.summary_source_text:
Why Arizona State could be the turning point of Coach Prime and Colorado’s season On today’s DNVR Buffs Podcast, the squad is joined by PHNX Sun Devils’ Anthony Totri to preview and break down the matchups for Coach Prime and Colorado’s late season road trip to Tempe to take on Kenny Dillingham’s Arizona State Sun Devils. videos.title: Where does Bo Nix rank among the quarterbacks selected in the 2024 NFL Draft after two full seasons?
videos.summary_source_text:
Where does Bo Nix rank among the quarterbacks selected in the 2024 NFL Draft after two full seasons? After two full NFL seasons, where does Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix rank among the six quarterbacks selected in the first round of the 2024 NFL Draft?
The DNVR Broncos crew compares Nix with Caleb Williams, Jayden Daniels, Drake Maye, Michael Penix Jr. and J.J. McCarthy, examining their production, development, team success and long-term potential. Has Bo Nix proven he was one of the best quarterback picks in the 2024 draft class—and how high should he rank entering Year 3?
CHGO’s Mark Carman joins the show to make the case for Caleb Williams.

On the DNVR Broncos Podcast, Super Bowl 50 champion Bennie Fowler, Zac Stevens, Ryan Koenigsberg and Henry Chisholm are coming to you LIVE from the DNVR Bar to break down all of the latest news in Broncos Country.

videos.title: The One Vitamin Many Seniors Overlook for Healthy Leg Circulation | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
The One Vitamin Many Seniors Overlook for Healthy Leg Circulation | Dr. Mandell Poor leg circulation is often blamed on aging, but the truth is there are many possible reasons your legs and feet may feel tired, cold, heavy, numb, or weak. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains one commonly overlooked vitamin that plays an important role in healthy nerves and overall leg health, why deficiencies become more common as we age, and how they can sometimes contribute to symptoms that are mistaken for circulation problems. You'll also learn the difference between poor circulation and nerve-related symptoms, the warning signs you should never ignore, practical lifestyle changes that support healthy blood flow, the best foods to help maintain adequate vitamin B12 levels, and when it's important to seek medical evaluation. Whether you're experiencing cold feet, leg fatigue, tingling, cramping, or numbness, understanding the underlying cause is the first step toward finding the right solution. Don't ignore what your body may be trying to tell you. Watch until the end for simple, science-based tips that may help you protect your circulation, support healthy nerves, and stay active for years to come.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Stop Trying To Hold Lag. It’s Why You Can’t Compress Your Irons
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Trying To Hold Lag. It’s Why You Can’t Compress Your Irons ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=13.07.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=13.07.26

If you struggle with casting, flipping, or releasing the golf club too early, trying to “hold the lag” in your downswing could actually be making the problem worse.
In this lesson with Roger, we look at why his shaft was leaning back at impact and how changing what happened through and after the golf ball helped him create a much better impact position without trying to force shaft lean.
You’ll see why the way you release the club through the ball can dramatically influence what happens before impact, and why a better release can help you create more lag, better shaft lean, and a more consistent strike.
If you’ve been trying to hold lag, drag the handle, or stop flipping the club, this lesson will give you a very different way to think about your downswing.

videos.title: Tangem Wallet Laser Attack Explained: Competitor Ledger Found Vulnerability (What You Need to Know)
videos.summary_source_text:
Tangem Wallet Laser Attack Explained: Competitor Ledger Found Vulnerability (What You Need to Know) ⚠️ FULL DISCLOSURE: Tangem is a sponsor of this channel and I promote their products. I made this video the same way I would if they were not a sponsor. Ledger — a direct competitor — published research showing they broke into a Tangem card with a laser. Here's exactly what they found, exactly how Tangem responded, and where I think both companies are spinning it.

Read the primary sources yourself. Don't take my word for it:
🔬 Ledger Donjon research: https://donjon.ledger.com/blog/bypassing-tangem-card-security-with-laser-attack/
🛡️ Tangem's official response: https://tangem.com/en/blog/post/lfi-response/

THE SHORT VERSION:
Ledger found a flaw that cannot be patched and affects every Tangem card in circulation. Disabling password recovery does NOT protect you. It also requires physically stealing your card, roughly $250,000 in lab equipment, hardware-security experts, and it destroys the card in the process. There have been zero documented real-world losses from this class of attack on any hardware wallet, ever.

Both of those things are true at the same time. Serious — and not a reason to panic.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 - Ledger Laser Attacked Tangem
00:32 - How the Laser Attack Actually Works
01:30 - The Uncomfortable Facts
02:15 - The Reassuring Facts
03:00 - How Tangem Responded
04:09 - Where BOTH Companies are Spinning It
04:45 - Where Tangem Was Soft on Facts
05:40 - What This Actually Means for You
07:20 - What I'm Watching Next
07:47 - The Bottom Line

🔑 IF YOU TAKE ONE THING AWAY:
This changes the risk of a LOST OR STOLEN card. If your card goes missing and you hold meaningful funds — move them to new keys. Don't assume the password is enough anymore. If your card is still in your pocket, your day-to-day risk barely moved. The things actually draining wallets right now are phishing, fake apps, and malicious contracts — not lasers.

📌 On the sponsorship: Tangem is a sponsor of this channel. That's a real conflict of interest, not a throwaway line. My rule is simple — when something bad comes out about a sponsor, I cover it the same way I would if they weren't a sponsor. If I ever can't do that, I'll drop the sponsorship, not the story. Hold me to it in the comments.

⚖️ Nothing in this video is financial or security advice. This is an educational breakdown of publicly available security research. Do your own research and make your own decisions.

Dak Prescott is finally getting the respect Cowboys fans have been waiting for.

On today's DLLS Cowboys Podcast, Jeff Cavanaugh, Jesse Holley and Clarence Hill react to ESPN's annual NFL rankings as voted on by league executives, coaches and scouts. Where does Dak Prescott rank among the league's best quarterbacks, and does the NFL finally see him the way Cowboys fans do?

The guys also break down the interior offensive line rankings. Tyler Smith has established himself as one of the NFL's elite linemen, but where do Tyler Booker and Cooper Beebe fit into the conversation heading into 2026?

videos.title: How Tough is Royal Birkdale? | The 154th Open | On The Road W/ Iona Stephen
videos.summary_source_text:
How Tough is Royal Birkdale? | The 154th Open | On The Road W/ Iona Stephen The 154th Open is upon us so now is the perfect chance to take a look at five of the toughest holes at Royal Birkdale.  

For this round, I’m joined by Course Manager Sean McLean to get the inside scoop on the five toughest holes on the Southport coast, the changes made to the course and the preparation that goes into hosting The Open. There’s nobody better to show us around this elegant and thoughtful golf course. 

And a big thank you to my caddie Paul whose seven years of knowledge of Royal Birkdale was invaluable, especially in a testing wind. 

Brought to you by Titleist.
#titleist #golf #The154thOpen #R&A #LinksGolf #RoyalBirkdale

videos.summary_source_text:

videos.title: I’m Completely Changing My Practice. Here’s Why You Should Too.
videos.summary_source_text:
I’m Completely Changing My Practice. Here’s Why You Should Too. Ever wonder why it's so hard to take your range game to the course? In this video, we compare my range swing quality numbers against actual on-course results at Praia D'El Rey to show why your driving range swing disappears on the 1st tee.

We've all been there: you are hitting it pure on the launch monitor or practice mat, but the moment you step onto a real golf hole, the scoring consistency vanishes. The truth is, there is a massive gap between hitting a good golf shot on the range and actually playing the game of golf under real-world conditions.

Watch as I test a new "controlled takeaway" swing feel on the back nine in Portugal, while tracking a fascinating metric: my perceived "range quality" rating versus the actual result on the course. The drop-off in my approach shot data at the end of the round completely blew my mind—and it proves that 90% of amateurs are practicing completely wrong.

videos.title: The BEST Putter We've Ever Reviewed!
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Putter We've Ever Reviewed! Rick Shiels tests the brand-new L.A.B. Golf VZN.1i putter to see whether its unusual design and zero-torque technology can deliver on the greens. Could this genuinely be the best putter we’ve ever reviewed?


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

• Bryson DeChambeau

• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Should you buy new or used golf clubs 🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
Should you buy new or used golf clubs 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: DRAMATIC Finish in Scotland | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
DRAMATIC Finish in Scotland | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Watch the drama unfold in Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo, as Tom Kim clinched his maiden DP World Tour title in style. Tom Kim held off the challenge of Min Woo Lee and European Ryder Cup stars Rory McIlroy and Robert MacIntyre to secure a two-shot victory after beginning the final round in a tie for fourth.

The victory guarantees Kim an invite to the Masters Tournament in 2027, a tournament he has previously played three times (2023, 2024 and 2025).

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/ Watch the drama unfold in Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo, as Tom Kim clinched his maiden DP World Tour title in style. Tom Kim held off the challenge of Min Woo Lee and European Ryder Cup stars Rory McIlroy and Robert MacIntyre to secure a two-shot victory after beginning the final round in a tie for fourth.

The victory guarantees Kim an invite to the Masters Tournament in 2027, a tournament he has previously played three times (2023, 2024 and 2025).

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/
videos.summary: DRAMATIC Finish in Scotland 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Watch the drama unfold in Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo, as Tom Kim clinched his maiden DP World Tour title in style. Tom Kim held off the challenge of Min Woo Lee and European Ryder Cup stars Rory McIlroy and Robert MacIntyre to secure a two-shot victory after beginning the final round in a tie for fourth.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | ISCO Championship | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | ISCO Championship | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the 2026 ISCO Championship, featuring Steven Fisk, Lucas Glover, Taylor Pendrith and Max Homa, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to Kentucky this week for the ISCO Championship, co-sanctioned with the DP World Tour for the fifth consecutive year. As one of the final events before the FedExCup Playoffs approach, valuable points are on offer at Hurstbourne Country Club, with a blend of established PGA TOUR winners, rising stars and international talent making up the field. Max Homa headlines the field after finishing runner-up at the John Deere Classic, his best result of the 2026 season. Defending champion William Mouw returns looking to become the first player to successfully defend the ISCO Championship, while major champion Lucas Glover also tees it up after contending late into last week's event. Harry Higgs is back in action alongside more than 40 DP World Tour members, led by Christiaan Bezuidenhout. The tournament also features an exciting group of emerging talent, including Jackson Koivun, Luke Clanton, Ben James and Gordon Sargent, while 17-year-old amateur Miles Russell headlines the sponsor exemptions after another impressive season. NCAA champion Preston Stout also arrives in Kentucky fresh off a top-15 finish at the John Deere Classic. With 300 FedExCup points on the line and one of the final opportunities to climb the standings before the closing stretch of the season, the ISCO Championship promises another competitive week as PGA TOUR and DP World Tour players battle for a breakthrough victory in Kentucky.

If you struggle with pulls, over fades, or weak shots to the right, these high handicap golf tips are going to change how you think about your setup and downswing. In this golf instruction lesson, Eric Cogorno works with a student fighting a steep over-the-top move and fixes his miss pattern in minutes — the student was drawing the ball within five minutes of making two simple changes. The fix starts with closing the shoulder line at setup and adding right side depth in the backswing. These golf drills can be practiced at the range immediately and apply to any golfer who wants to stop pulling it left and start swinging from the inside. If you leave this video without trying the closed shoulder drill, you're leaving distance and consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why an open shoulder line at setup causes a steep downswing and pull fades
• How closing the shoulder line at setup automatically shallows the swing path
• High handicap golf tips for eliminating pulls and weak fades with two setup changes
• The alignment stick drill for training the correct follow through direction
• How to feel the right shoulder tuck and correct lead forearm position at setup
• The halfway back to arms parallel drill for training face rotation through impact
• Why a deeper right-side turn in the backswing makes inside-out golf instruction feel natural
• How to take the same golf swing feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

videos.title: The #1 Best Remedy to Get Rid of Tartar
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Best Remedy to Get Rid of Tartar Find out how to get rid of tartar naturally by targeting the biofilm that causes it. Tartar isn’t just hardened plaque, it’s a calcium-protected biofilm created by bacteria living on your teeth. The goal isn’t simply to scrape it away, but to help break down the biofilm and support a healthier oral environment.

🌟Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fx3IxZ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

To get rid of tartar, mix ½ teaspoon of baking soda with a few drops of 3% hydrogen peroxide to make a paste, then apply it to your teeth. Hydrogen peroxide helps break down the biofilm, while baking soda helps raise the pH in your mouth. Reducing sugar and starches also helps create an environment that’s less favorable for the microbes that contribute to plaque and tartar buildup.

videos.title: OFFSEASON STORYLINES! 3 Carolina Hurricanes Offseason Storylines
videos.summary_source_text:
OFFSEASON STORYLINES! 3 Carolina Hurricanes Offseason Storylines As we get deeper into the offseason, what are some storylines for the Carolina Hurricanes as they're almost a month away from winning the Stanley Cup? What should fans keep an eye on as we slowly get closer to the 2026-27 season? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on what the Hurricanes will do with Jesperi Kotkaniemi. Over the last couple of weeks, he was at the 1/3rd buyout limit, but now, he is set to make over $1 million per season if bought out. If he is not bought out, what can the Hurricanes do to move him if a trade is the way to go? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes waiting out the Alexander Nikishin contract situation, as there has been no updated progress. Is it better to sign him closer to what he wants, or is it something to look into when it comes to a trade? What does a sensible trade look like if he is not signed? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes are possibly going into the upcoming season running it back with the same roster. That said, does it make sense to do so? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Honda Super-N Review: It proves UK rules are STUPID!
videos.summary_source_text:
Honda Super-N Review: It proves UK rules are STUPID! This is our in-depth review of the Honda Super N. We’ll review the design, the interior, what it’s like to drive, and whether Honda made the right choice by making it electric. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the Honda Super N! 

This miniature maestro is based on Honda’s Japanese market N-One e kei car, but it’s been scaled up for the UK and European market. 

The thing is, can this tiny EV with a super small price tag offer real competition to more established small EVs such as the Renault 5? Let’s take a closer look. 

Starting with the design, there’s no denying that the Super-N has real presence on the road, despite its small size. The boxy design helps it stand out, and it’s only available in one colour - the purple you see in this video! The front end really exemplifies the boxy nature of the car, and along the side, the flared wheel arches give it even more presence. Around the back, there’s a small spoiler to make you think this could be a real pocket rocket. 

However, that’s not really the case. The Super-N is powered by a single electric motor driving the front wheels, and this only delivers 64hp. There is a boost button to help increase power for a small duration, but this only boosts output to 95hp. What’s more, the battery is small, with the Super-N only having a range of up to 120 miles! 

On the inside, the Super-N’s build quality is aligned with its small price tag. There’s plastic across the dash, with the majority of the materials within the car cheap to the touch. There’s an infotainment screen, which, while relatively basic, at least comes with Apple CarPlay & Android Auto, and the digital dials screen is small but does what it’s supposed to do. 

So the Honda Super-N rolls up with a cost of just £18,995, but does it really offer good value for money? And did Honda make a mistake only selling it as an EV? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1307
